title: Instruction Conflict Debugger
description: Deconstruct a prompt into instruction sources, identify ambiguity and conflict, apply hierarchy, and select refusal, clarification, or execution.

Instruction Conflict Debugger

learningObjectives: Deconstruct a prompt into instruction sources, identify ambiguity and conflict, apply hierarchy, and select refusal, clarification, or execution.

commonMisconceptions: Synthetic agreement is equivalent to validated customer evidence.
